name: SafeSwitching
desc: When you switch stances, gain +2 [img:shield].

name: SafeSwitching2
desc: When you switch stances, gain +3 [img:shield] and cleanse one stack of a random debuff.

name: Mixup
desc: When you switch stances, your next basic attack this turn is critical.

name: Mixup2
desc:
When you switch stances, your next basic attack this turn is critical.
Critical hits you land inflict Confusion 1.

name: Turnabout
desc: Your basic melee attacks inflict Confusion 1 and make units face away from you.

name: Turnabout2
desc: Your basic melee attacks inflict Confusion 1, make units face away from you, and have a 20% chance to inflict Stun 1.

name: MonkeyStyle
desc: 15% chance to block damage and counter-attack.

name: MonkeyStyle2
desc: 33% chance to block damage and counter-attack.

name: BrickSkin
desc: Any [img:shield] you gain is increased by 2.

name: BrickSkin2
desc: Any [img:shield] you gain is increased by 2.

name: JaggedEdges
desc: When you lose [img:shield], gain +1 Thorns.

name: JaggedEdges2
desc: When you lose [img:shield], gain that many Thorns.

name: MindBreaker
desc: Your basic attack inflicts Magic Weakness 1.

name: MindBreaker2
desc: Your basic attack inflicts Magic Weakness 2.

name: CobraStyle
desc: When an enemy moves into an adjacent tile, perform a weak melee attack on it.

name: CobraStyle2
desc: When an enemy moves into an adjacent tile, perform a weak melee attack on it, twice!

name: Tenderize
desc: Your basic melee attacks inflict Bruise 1.

name: Tenderize2
desc: Your basic melee attacks inflict Bruise 1 and have a 15% chance to inflict Stun 1.

name: LongArms
desc: +1 Range and +1 Reach.

name: LongArms2
desc: +1 Range and +1 Reach.

name: SpreadthePain
desc: Deal 2 extra damage the first time you damage each unit each turn.

name: SpreadthePain2
desc: Deal 2 extra damage with 100% crit chance the first time you damage each unit each turn.

name: Harden
desc: When you gain [img:shield], also gain temporary Brace 1.

name: Harden2
desc:
When you gain [img:shield], also gain temporary Brace 1.
Gain +1 [img:shield] when you hit a unit with your basic attack.

name: IronSkinTechnique
desc: Gain +2 [img:shield] when you land a critical hit. +10% critical chance.

name: IronSkinTechnique2
desc: Gain +3 [img:shield] when you land a critical hit. +25% critical chance.

name: JetFists
desc: Your melee attacks and abilities blow wind through the tiles they hit.

name: JetFists2
desc: Your melee attacks and abilities blow wind through the tiles they hit in a large cone.

name: EnergyFists
desc: Emit a Sparkle when you use your basic attack.

name: EnergyFists2
desc: Emit two Sparkles when you use your basic attack.

name: Unstoppable!
desc: You're immune to knockback, Stun, Slow, and other mobility debuffs.

name: Unstoppable!2
desc: You're immune to knockback and debuffs.

name: UnburdenedMotion
desc: +1 [img:spd] and +10% dodge chance for each empty armor slot. If all of your armor slots are empty, you can use your movement action an extra time.

name: UnburdenedMotion2
desc: +2 [img:spd] and +15% dodge chance for each empty armor slot. If all of your armor slots are empty, you gain flying and can use your movement action an extra time.

name: UnburdenedStrikes
desc: +10% critical hit chance and +25% critical hit damage for each empty armor slot. If all of your armor slots are empty, counter-attack whenever you get hit.

name: UnburdenedStrikes2
desc: +10% critical hit chance and +25% critical hit damage for each empty armor slot. If all of your armor slots are empty your critical hits inflict bruise, and counter-attack whenever you get hit.

name: UnburdenedThoughts
desc: +1 [img:int] and +1 [img:cha] for each empty armor slot. If all of your armor slots are empty, your spells cost 1 less mana.

name: UnburdenedThoughts2
desc: +1 [img:int], +1 [img:cha], and +1 Kinetic Spikes for each empty armor slot. If all of your armor slots are empty, you have +2 Magic Damage and your spells cost 1 less mana.

name: RunningJab
desc: When you end your movement, automatically use your basic attack if an enemy is in range.

name: RunningJab2
desc: When you end your movement, automatically use your basic attack if an enemy is in range. You can move an extra time each turn.

name: PerfectTechnique
desc: While in ranged stance, You have +1 Range and +2 Magic Damage. While in melee stance, you have +1 Brace.

name: PerfectTechnique2
desc: While in ranged stance, You have +1 Range, +2 Kinetic Spikes, and +2 Magic Damage. While in melee stance, you have +2 Brace and +2 Health Regeneration.

name: RapidFlow
desc: When you switch stances, do a spin attack that hits all adjacent units.

name: RapidFlow2
desc: When you switch stances, do a double spin attack that hits all adjacent units.

name: CounterBarrage
desc: When you take damage from an enemy attack, gain +1 Bonus Attack.

name: CounterBarrage2
desc: When you take damage from an enemy attack, gain +1 Bonus Attack and +1 Bonus Move.

name: FlowState
desc: When you deal damage to another unit, gain +1 [img:str] and +2 [img:dex] until the end of the turn.

name: FlowState2
desc: When you deal damage to another unit, gain +2 [img:str], +2 [img:dex], and +2 [img:lck] until the end of the turn.

name: DancingLights
desc: When you switch stances, for each empty armor slot, emit a Sparkle. If all slots are empty gain +1 to a random stat.

name: DancingLights2
desc:
When you switch stances, for each empty armor slot, emit a Sparkle. If all slots are empty gain +1 to a random stat.
While all armor slots are empty, you have +1 Magic Damage.
